name.description: The name of the App Service Plan

kind.description: The kind of the App Service Plan

maximum_elastic_worker_count.description: The maximum number of total workers allowed for this ElasticScaleEnabled App Service Plan.

sku.type: list(object({ tier: string, size: string, capacity: optional(number) }))

app_service_environment_id.description: The ID of the App Service Environment used by this App Service Plan.

reserved.description: Is this App Service Plan Reserved.

per_site_scaling.description: If true, apps assigned to this App Service Plan can be scaled independently.

is_xenon.description: Whether to create a xenon App Service Plan.

zone_redundant.description: Whether this App Service Plan is zone redundant.

tags.description: A map of tags to apply to the App Service Plan.

timeouts.type: object({ create: optional(string), delete: optional(string), read: optional(string), update: optional(string) })
timeouts.description: A map of timeouts for the App Service Plan.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
